symptom_description: Boiler efficiency dropped from 86% to 79% over 2 weeks
root_cause: Air preheater tube fouling due to high sulphur coal ash
resolution: Chemical cleaning of APH tubes + coal quality adjustment

symptom_description: Unit fails to reach set temperature — flame instability observed
root_cause: Blocked fuel nozzle + incorrect combustion air damper setting
resolution: Nozzle cleaning + damper recalibration per SOP-TF-03

symptom_description: Water wall tube leak detected — emergency shutdown
root_cause: Erosion at soot blower impingement zone — wall thinning below 3mm
resolution: Tube replacement + soot blower realignment + NDT inspection
spare_parts_used: Water wall tubes x4 + welding rods

symptom_description: SO2 levels exceeding 200 mg/Nm3 against limit of 100
root_cause: Slurry recirculation pump cavitation — low pH in scrubber
resolution: Pump impeller replacement + limestone dosing adjustment

symptom_description: Chilled water outlet temp 12°C vs design 7°C — capacity loss
root_cause: Crystallization in absorber due to excess vacuum loss
resolution: Decrystallization procedure + vacuum pump seal replacement

symptom_description: ID fan vibration exceeding 8 mm/s — tripping on high alarm
root_cause: Bearing wear + impeller buildup
resolution: Bearing replacement + dynamic balancing + impeller cleaning

symptom_description: Heat transfer coefficient dropped 40% — heavy scaling observed
root_cause: Suspected calcium sulphate scaling from feed water quality
resolution: Acid cleaning scheduled + feed water pretreatment review

symptom_description: Hot spots observed on furnace casing — refractory spalling
root_cause: Thermal cycling stress + inadequate curing during last repair
resolution: Gunning repair of damaged zones + controlled heat-up schedule

symptom_description: DCS communication loss — intermittent control loop failures
root_cause: Corroded terminal strips in marshalling cabinet due to humidity
resolution: Terminal strip replacement + cabinet dehumidifier installed

symptom_description: Coal feeder jamming frequently — bed temperature fluctuations
root_cause: Wet coal causing bridging in bunker + worn feeder screws
resolution: Bunker vibrator installation + feeder screw replacement pending

symptom_description: Thermic fluid turning dark — suspected carbon residue formation
root_cause: Operating temperature exceeded fluid limit by 15°C intermittently
resolution: Partial fluid replacement + high-temp alarm setpoint correction

symptom_description: Carryover of slurry droplets into clean gas duct
root_cause: Mist eliminator wash nozzles clogged + blade deformation
resolution: Nozzle replacement + blade section renewal scheduled

symptom_description: Solution pump mechanical seal failure — fluid leak
root_cause: Seal face wear due to crystallized solution particles
resolution: Seal replacement + strainer installation on pump suction

symptom_description: Bottom ash cooler screw conveyor seized — ash removal stopped
root_cause: Clinker formation due to high ash fusion temperature coal batch
resolution: Conveyor bearing + screw flight replacement + coal blend adjustment

symptom_description: Economizer finned tube leak — feedwater loss observed
root_cause: Dew point corrosion — flue gas temp below acid dew point
resolution: Tube plugging + economizer bypass + minimum load procedure update

symptom_description: Steam generation 15% below MCR despite full fuel feed
root_cause: Cyclone separator erosion — excessive particle bypass to convection pass
resolution: Cyclone refractory relining + wear plate replacement

symptom_description: Unusual metallic noise from FD fan — intermittent grinding sound
root_cause: Loose impeller hub bolt + minor blade tip rubbing against casing
resolution: Hub bolt retorquing + casing clearance adjustment

symptom_description: Particulate emission 85 mg/Nm3 vs limit 50 — opacity high
root_cause: Rapping system failure in 3rd field + broken collecting plates
resolution: Rapping motor replacement + plate realignment
spare_parts_used: Rapping motors x3 + collecting plates x12

symptom_description: Superheater tube leak — steam plume visible from casing joint
root_cause: Long-term creep damage at tube bend — exceeded design temp intermittently
resolution: Tube section replacement + operating procedure update for GT load matching

symptom_description: Heater fails to maintain pilot flame — repeated lockouts
root_cause: Defective UV flame scanner + low fuel oil viscosity at ambient temperature
resolution: Scanner replacement + fuel oil preheater recalibration

symptom_description: CW outlet temperature 5°C above design — condenser vacuum dropping
root_cause: Cooling tower fill media deterioration + algae growth on drift eliminators
resolution: Fill media replacement in 2 cells + biocide treatment program
spare_parts_used: CT fill media 200 m2 + biocide chemicals

symptom_description: Economizer tube external corrosion — acid dew point condensation
root_cause: Continuous low load operation causing flue gas temp below 130°C at economizer
resolution: Tube section replacement + minimum load interlock implementation

symptom_description: Bed pressure fluctuating ±500 mmWC — unstable fluidization
root_cause: Air distribution plate nozzle blockage — 20% nozzles choked with clinker
resolution: Nozzle cleaning + bed material change out + PA fan damper tuning

symptom_description: Caustic embrittlement observed on evaporator shell welds
root_cause: Stress corrosion cracking from high NaOH concentration + thermal cycling
resolution: Weld repair + post-weld heat treatment + NaOH concentration monitoring

symptom_description: Filter differential pressure 250 mmWC vs design 150 — high power draw
root_cause: Bag blinding due to moisture in gas + inadequate pulse cleaning pressure
resolution: Bag replacement in compartment 3 + compressed air dryer installation
spare_parts_used: Filter bags x120 + air dryer unit

symptom_description: Solution pump vibration 6.5 mm/s — bearing temperature rising
root_cause: Pump shaft misalignment after maintenance + worn coupling spider
resolution: Shaft realignment + coupling spider replacement

symptom_description: PA fan drive-end bearing failure — high temperature alarm
root_cause: Lubricant contamination with coal dust + seal deterioration
resolution: Bearing replacement + labyrinth seal upgrade + oil mist lubrication
spare_parts_used: PA fan bearings x2 + labyrinth seals

symptom_description: FGD absorber tower internal lining corrosion — rubber lining delaminating
root_cause: Chemical attack from high chloride content in flue gas + thermal cycling
resolution: Rubber lining repair in affected sections + flue gas chloride monitoring

symptom_description: Cyclone vortex finder refractory erosion — particle leakage to convection
root_cause: High velocity abrasion + refractory material not suited for coal ash composition
resolution: Refractory replacement with SiC-based castable + velocity reduction by cyclone geometry modification

symptom_description: ESP automatic voltage controller oscillating — frequent spark trips
root_cause: AVC card firmware issue + dirty insulators reducing creepage distance
resolution: AVC card replacement + insulator cleaning schedule implementation

symptom_description: Heater efficiency dropped to 78% — high stack temperature 280°C
root_cause: Carbon deposits on coil surface reducing heat transfer + excess air at 8%
resolution: Online chemical cleaning + combustion tuning per SOP-TF-03

symptom_description: Drum downcomer tube crack — detected during planned shutdown inspection
root_cause: Fatigue cracking from repeated thermal transients during load cycling
resolution: Tube replacement + controlled ramp rate procedure + weld quality upgrade

symptom_description: WHRB steam output 20% below design — GT exhaust gas parameters normal
root_cause: Superheater tube bank fouling — iron oxide deposits from GT side
resolution: Chemical cleaning of SH tubes + desuperheater spray valve repair

symptom_description: Abnormal noise from CT fan — low frequency rumbling
root_cause: Fan blade pitch angle variation due to loose hub + gear reducer oil level low
resolution: Blade pitch correction + gear oil top-up + hub bolt retorquing

symptom_description: NOx levels 450 mg/Nm3 vs limit 300 — SNCR system underperforming
root_cause: SNCR urea injection nozzles clogged + injection location not optimal
resolution: Nozzle cleaning + injection lance repositioning to 850°C zone
spare_parts_used: SNCR nozzles x8 + lance assemblies x3

symptom_description: Chiller unable to pull vacuum after annual maintenance — non-condensables present
root_cause: Improper sealing of inspection flanges during reassembly + purge pump check valve stuck
resolution: Flange gasket replacement + purge pump overhaul
spare_parts_used: Flange gaskets x6 + purge pump valve kit

symptom_description: Pulse valve solenoids failing sequentially — compartments going offline
root_cause: Moisture in compressed air corroding solenoid internals + timer board fault
resolution: Solenoid replacement + compressed air dryer upgrade + timer board replacement
spare_parts_used: Solenoids x24 + timer board + air dryer

symptom_description: Unburnt carbon in fly ash 8% — target below 3%
root_cause: Bed height below optimal + secondary air port blockage reducing overfire air
resolution: Bed material addition + SA port cleaning + PA/SA ratio adjustment
spare_parts_used: Bed material 8T + SA port nozzles x12

symptom_description: Furnace floor vibration during start-up — structural resonance
root_cause: Fluidization instability at low load + structural natural frequency match
resolution: Dynamic analysis pending + temporary operating load restriction

symptom_description: Economizer tube leak — detected by makeup water increase
root_cause: Pitting corrosion from dissolved oxygen in feedwater — deaerator malfunction
resolution: Tube plugging + deaerator vent valve repair + chemical dosing optimization
spare_parts_used: Tube plugs x6 + vent valve assembly

symptom_description: Multiple-effect evaporator — scaling in 2nd and 3rd effects — reduced capacity
root_cause: Calcium carbonate scaling from inadequate anti-scalant dosing
resolution: Acid cleaning all effects + anti-scalant dosing pump upgrade

symptom_description: FD fan non-drive-end bearing seizure — fan trip
root_cause: Grease over-lubrication causing bearing overheating + seal failure
resolution: Bearing replacement + automatic greasing system installation

symptom_description: Thermic fluid heater shell external corrosion under insulation
root_cause: Rainwater ingress through damaged insulation cladding — lagging deterioration
resolution: Insulation and cladding replacement + protective coating application

symptom_description: ESP collection efficiency dropped to 96% from design 99.5%
root_cause: Electrode misalignment in field 2 + back corona due to high-resistivity ash
resolution: Electrode realignment + SO3 conditioning system commissioning
spare_parts_used: Electrode hangers x16 + SO3 dosing system

symptom_description: FGD oxidation air blower trip — gypsum quality degradation
root_cause: Blower rotor imbalance + air filter clogging reducing flow
resolution: Rotor balancing + filter replacement + air flow monitoring

symptom_description: Furnace lower refractory erosion — hot spots on water wall panels
root_cause: High velocity bed material erosion + poor quality refractory from last overhaul
resolution: Refractory replacement with erosion-resistant castable + studded tube installation

symptom_description: Boiler master controller unable to maintain load — hunting ±10%
root_cause: Feed-forward signal from coal feeder lost + PID tuning degraded over time
resolution: Feed-forward signal wiring repair + complete PID retuning

symptom_description: CT structural steel corrosion — support beam section loss
root_cause: Chloride-induced corrosion from cooling water blowdown splashing + inadequate coating
resolution: Structural assessment ongoing + beam reinforcement planned

symptom_description: Auxiliary power consumption 2% above design — overall efficiency impact
root_cause: Fan operating at higher damper position due to air ingress + VFD malfunction
resolution: Air ingress sealing + VFD card replacement + fan curve optimization

symptom_description: Evaporator tube leak at weld joint — detected during hydro test
root_cause: Weld defect from original fabrication — incomplete fusion at root
resolution: Weld repair per ASME standards + additional radiography on adjacent welds

symptom_description: SPM 120 mg/Nm3 at ESP outlet vs limit 50 — load curtailment imposed
root_cause: ESP field 1 transformer failure + rapping system timing offset
resolution: Transformer replacement + rapping optimization + load ramp procedure

symptom_description: High-frequency whistling noise from TF heater burner during modulation
root_cause: Air register damper blade vibrating at resonance frequency during low fire
resolution: Damper blade modification + anti-vibration clip installation

symptom_description: Stack opacity exceeding 20% — bag filter DP normal
root_cause: Bag cage corrosion causing bag abrasion + bypass damper leaking
resolution: Cage replacement in 2 compartments + bypass damper seat repair
spare_parts_used: Bag cages x60 + damper seal ring

symptom_description: Chiller auto-shutdown on high generator temperature — repeated trips
root_cause: Hot water control valve hunting + temperature sensor calibration drift
resolution: Control valve actuator replacement + sensor recalibration

symptom_description: GGH (gas-gas heater) tube corrosion — acid condensation on cold side
root_cause: Low inlet gas temperature causing acid dew point condensation + coating failure
resolution: GGH tube bundle replacement planned + coating upgrade to C-276 alloy
